title: Poster Presentation: Protein Isolation from Spirulina platensis
content: A preliminary version of our work focusing on “Isolation and functional evaluation of valuable proteins from Spirulina platensis for sustainable bioprocessing” was presented as a poster at the International Conference on Advances in Biotechnology, Bioprocessing, and Structural Biology at IIT Roorkee in 2025. The study aimed at a lab-scale economic evaluation of mechanical and alkaline extraction and comparative precipitation of proteins. The precipitates showed characteristics comparable to commercial whey protein, indicating their potential as an alternative vegan protein source.

title: Oral Presentation at APA BIOFORUM, IIT Mandi
content: Hritick Gyan Verma delivered an oral presentation titled “Waste to Biomaterial: Targeted Recovery of Type I Collagen from Porcine Upper Dermis for Hydrogel Engineering” at the APA BIOFORUM held at IIT Mandi (May 22-23). The research, co-authored with Dr. Poonam Choudhary and Dr. Pravindra Kumar, highlights sustainable recovery methods for developing engineered hydrogels from biological waste.
